task_name: Educational Presentation on FLS, FES, and FUSE

frame_analyses.description: Title slide showing SAGES 2016 Surgical Spring Week panel on simulation training
Speaker introduction for Dr. Dimitrios Stefanidis presenting on simulation use
Overview of FLS program components including 5 simulated tasks and exam structure
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows all 5 FLS tasks in trainer boxes - peg transfer, pattern cutting, endoloop, extracorporeal suture, intracorporeal suture

frame_analyses.description: Introduction to Fundamentals of Endoscopic Surgery program with 12 modules and VR tasks
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Educational content on endoscopy training simulation

frame_analyses.description: FUSE program introduction for surgical energy device training
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Covers electrosurgery safety education with anatomical diagrams

frame_analyses.description: Research study showing FLS training improves OR performance in laparoscopic cholecystectomy
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Evidence-based validation of simulation training effectiveness

demonstrated_techniques: Overview of structured simulation training programs
Integration of cognitive and technical skill assessment
verbal_cues: FLS includes 4 online education modules and 5 simulated tasks
High stakes exam with cognitive test and FLS tasks
33% of practicing surgeons failed baseline FLS exam
Training improved performance from 317±103 to 402±54 points
common_errors_addressed: Insufficient assessment metrics for skill evaluation

confidence_rationale: Clear educational presentation with well-defined content about FLS, FES, and FUSE programs. No actual task performance to score.
cannot_determine: No FLS task performance visible - this is educational content only
technique_summary: Comprehensive educational overview of three major surgical simulation programs (FLS, FES, FUSE) with research evidence supporting their effectiveness in surgical training and quality improvement.
